approach: Rename .speckit.json to .spec-context.json, group sidebar by status instead of mtime, add colored ThemeIcons for step progress

specify.key_finding: Active/Earlier grouping uses mtime only; currentStep from .speckit.json is available via getFeatureWorkflow() but unused in tree rendering
